title: Salvies pvp pack cat edition
description: This is the salvies pvp pack, but with cats :3
body:
This is the main Salvies pvp pack, but with cats :3!!
Adding a custom **elytra 3d model texture**, a new **golden apple* and a new **totem of undying texture**.


_**IF U DON'T LIKE CATS THEN THIS PACK IS NOT RECOMMENDED! :Є**_

[The official pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/salvies-pvp-pack)
